category_sources: source_facts.description says CLI tool for sr.ht; official SourceHut repository page describes hut as a CLI tool for sr.ht.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is hut; official SourceHut project page and repository use hut.
docs_sources: Official repository README points users to the man page for all commands and includes usage instructions.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.source-archive is from git.sr.ht/~xenrox/hut and official project homepage is sr.ht/~xenrox/hut. The project is also browsable at the maintainer's SourceHut instance git.xenrox.net/~xenrox/hut.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official repository README identify hut as a CLI for sr.ht; README references git, lists, todo, builds, paste, pages, and other SourceHut services.
